title: Actual results
author: Cyclonit
selftext: So I was wondering whether anyone can share actual results they got after using ai for trading over a few months. I am very interested in the topic, but knowing how AI keeps messing up in other fields, I am somewhat sceptical. Especially when some folks claim their models can generate excessive gains in very short time frames.

comments.author: 1EvergreenSolutions
comments.body:
Ours has performed exceptionally well the past year on NQ1! ! 

Our algorithm, ONE, profited 130% from NQ1! with a 1 contract basis on a 50k account from September 12, 2024 to September 12, 2025.

replies.author: 1EvergreenSolutions
replies.body: Our results can be found here [www.evergreensolutions.one](https://www.evergreensolutions.one)

comments.author: Statis_Fund
comments.body: We don't use AI to trade directly but to assist with statistical analysis and algorithm creation. Our flagship algorithm, Volatis strategy, has returned over 100% since Oct. 2023
